name: M4A1消音版 | 隐伏帝王龙
nameZh: M4A1消音版 | 隐伏帝王龙
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. It has been custom painted to look like a dinosaur is clawing through the side of the weapon. Feeding frenzy
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 这把武器使用像一只恐龙从武器的一面撕裂到另一面的图案进行了自定义涂装。 疯狂撕咬
